message:
ci(deps): bump taiki-e/install-action from 2.75.19 to 2.75.23

Updates SHA pin from 5f57d6cb (# v2) to 481c34c1 (v2.75.23 tag SHA).

Closes Dependabot PR #266.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,7 +34,7 @@ jobs:
           toolchain: nightly
 
       - name: Install cargo-audit
-        uses: taiki-e/install-action@5f57d6cb7cd20b14a8a27f522884c4bc8a187458  # v2
+        uses: taiki-e/install-action@481c34c1cf3a84c68b5e46f4eccfc82af798415a  # v2.75.23
         with:
           tool: cargo-audit

@@ -57,7 +57,7 @@ jobs:
       - uses: actions/checkout@de0fac2e4500dabe0009e67214ff5f5447ce83dd  # v6.0.2
 
       - name: Install cargo-audit
-        uses: taiki-e/install-action@5f57d6cb7cd20b14a8a27f522884c4bc8a187458  # v2
+        uses: taiki-e/install-action@481c34c1cf3a84c68b5e46f4eccfc82af798415a  # v2.75.23
         with:
           tool: cargo-audit
 
@@ -161,7 +161,7 @@ jobs:
         uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@e18b497796c12c097a38f9edb9d0641fb99eee32  # v2.9.1
 
       - name: Install cargo-llvm-cov
-        uses: taiki-e/install-action@5f57d6cb7cd20b14a8a27f522884c4bc8a187458  # v2
+        uses: taiki-e/install-action@481c34c1cf3a84c68b5e46f4eccfc82af798415a  # v2.75.23
         with:
           tool: cargo-llvm-cov
